rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Implementation-level signal routing assignments should be placed in the implementation annex after relevant subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by placing AGREE contracts in valid scopes matching component type or implementation
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model when generating AGREE contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type contracts contain assumptions and guarantees; implementation contracts contain bindings and assignments
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
